inputs.text: Main thoda bukhar aur thakaan mehsoos kar rahi hoon
Meri khansi shuru ho gayi hai, aur woh bhi sookhi khansi

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Persistent dry cough could be bronchitis

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Cough could be a viral infection

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Still less likely, but needs monitoring

inputs.text: Main raat ko bahut pasina aata hai, aur mere vajan mein kami aa rahi hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Night sweats and weight loss are cardinal signs of Tuberculosis

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Less likely, as bronchitis does not typically cause night sweats and weight loss

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Could be a possibility, but less likely than Tuberculosis

inputs.text: Mujhe bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai, aur mere balgam mein khoon aa raha hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Blood in sputum is a confirmatory sign of Tuberculosis

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out, as bronchitis does not typically cause blood in sputum

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out, as pneumonia does not typically cause blood in sputum
